'''Pol SulliVaan''' was an ambassador of the [[Givin/Legends|Givin]]. When [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] arrived on [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]], SulliVaan greeted Leia in a mathematical formula that was different from their standard greeting. Luke Skywalker quickly figured out what the desired result was, and sent a mental image into Leia's mind.
